title: Lumi AI
description: A pixel-art AI companion application that allows users to connect their own API keys and interact with an animated assistant.

title: Plant Doc
description: An AI-powered plant disease detection application developed during the Infosys Springboard internship using image and text analysis.

title: Weather App
description: A weather forecasting application featuring API integration, dynamic weather updates, and an animated mascot companion.

title: Aesthetic To-Do
description: A cute productivity application with a scrapbook-inspired interface and a virtual character companion.

title: Expense Tracker
description: A personal finance application with a virtual companion that helps users track spending and manage budgets effectively.
